step_rationale: Macrophage and B-cell kinase; drives foam-cell formation and inflammatory signaling in the atherosclerotic plaque.
mechanism: BTK amplifies macrophage activation and lipid uptake into foam cells, accelerating plaque inflammation and destabilization.

references.title: Key immune-related hub genes BTK, ITGAL and PTX3 mediate macrophage phenotypic shift and foam cell formation in the periodontitis-atherosclerosis axis.
